items.title: Bowen: Trump needs this war to end but Iran is not backing down
items.summary: Under pressure from the polls and Gulf allies, the White House is pushing for a deal but Iran wants concessions, writes BBC's international editor.

items.title: Sinn Féin proposes reform to remove threat of Northern Ireland Assembly ‘collapse’
items.summary: Nationalist party says veto over power-sharing at Stormont should be scrapped

items.title: GoPro Warns of Going-Concern Risk Amid AI-Fueled Memory Crunch
items.summary: Surging memory costs are pushing action-camera maker GoPro Inc. to the brink. The company, founded by Nicholas Woodman, warned of risks to its ability to continue as a going concern and is seeking financing to avert a default, according to a latest filing.

Australian Wheat Crop Expected to Drop 26% on Weather, War Costs
items.summary: Australia’s winter wheat crop is forecast to fall by more than a quarter in the 2026/27 season due to unusually dry weather, low global prices and higher input costs resulting from the war in the Middle East.

items.title:
RT by @UN: Briefing the Security Council, Director Kayoko Gotoh warned that the recent drone strike in Romania that injured civilians highlights the growing risk of spillover from the war in Ukraine. We urge dialogue and negotiations to resume.

Her full remarks: https://dppa.un.org/en/news/drone-strike-in-romania-underscores-growing-risk-of-spillover-of-the-war-in-ukraine

items.title: Oil Holds Gains, US Futures Slip on War Confusion: Markets Wrap
items.summary: US equity futures edged lower and oil held gains as Washington struggled to get efforts toward an Iran peace deal back on track.

Gold Holds Fall as Traders Digest Confusion Over US-Iran Talks
items.summary: Gold held a decline as conflicting messages from the US and Iran on a diplomatic resolution to the war kept concerns over prolonged trade and geopolitical disruptions alive.
